Wu Qi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Qi. Brother of Wu Fen and son of Wu Jing. Friends with Gu Tan and Zhang Wen. Wu Qi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
